reviews.review_description: This game alone is fully worth the price of paying for Meta Quest 3 for me. Incredible depth and it is so much fun to play while at the same time very realistic. The absolute wide variety of game modes and situations make it even more interesting. The stadiums are beautiful right from the quaint countryside grounds to big city behemoths. Thank you so much to the developers and creators for the hard work they have done and continue to do on this!

Honestly didn’t expect to spend this much time in this game, but it’s become one of the VR games I play the most now. The shot timing and batting mechanics feel really good once you get the hang of it, and hitting clean boundaries is super satisfying.

I’ve also had a lot of fun playing online matches and trying to climb the leaderboards. There are a few small things that could still improve, but the game already offers a lot of content and the developers seem to keep updating it regularly. Overall a really enjoyable experience.

IB cricket is a dream come true for Cricket lovers seeking to enjoy real cricket. It just feels so real while batting. Just needs to work on a few aspects though:-
1. Ball sliding down the leg side is never given a wide. 
2. The ball towards the leg stumps almost always goes on to hit the stumps, while actually it is way far sliding down the leg. 
3. Something weird - Irrespective of how many runs have been given by a particular bowler, he goes on to complete his qouta of overs because only 5 bowlers are pre-selected at the start of the innings with no room to add further bowler (s) if some bowlers goes for plenty of runs. 
4. It would be ideal if somehow LBW factor is added in - probably the single most wanted feature to make it even more fascinating. 
5.Tail enders' batting efficiency may be reduced to get more realistic feeling (one option is to gradually reduce their bat shield towards minus from batter number 8 to 11).
6. There should be an offline tournament mode where a players can play a tournament against multiple AI teams, like bilateral series, three-team series, T20/ ODI World Cup by player customisation

This is the best VR cricket game available currently, no other game even comes close. The graphics is outstanding and game feels truly immersive. Few things I would like devs to improvise with the future updates.

Add an option to play a full tournament like IPL starting from group stage. Add toss option here, Allow opponent teams to have AI based scores to decide match result. Points chart after each game.
It seems the latest update made some weired changes to Wide ball criteria. It doesn't consider wide even if the ball is well outside the mark.
Make the bat-groumd hitting sound more realistic.
Add an option of full body tracking if possible which will take the experience to another level.
Add a birds eye camera view which can be used to play replays. It will be an amazing addition to the replay.
Add cheerleaders if possible.
Make the overall graphics more realistic like grass, pitch texture etc.
Make commentry more dynamic. It's very predictive for now. 
Option to explore dressing rooms/bat change etc.
Option to see replay on the big screen.

You guys are already doing an amazing work, please keep surprising us with the more frequent updates. Thank you!!

Good game the graphics are good and it’s a good game but you cannot bow in game I mean like  I wish it didn’t give you a target that you can select I wish we could bowl and then chase it down. You can bowl in pvp kind of I want to physically bowl 
Not choose the line an length and it does it

Am playing IB cricket almost everyday! But from past 2days am seeing an error or issue! initially it shown “for your better enjoyment, we are improving the game and come back in 5hrs 30min” and now it’s showing same message with 6hrs 30min time, it’s keep on increasing! There is no proper communication about these kind of system updates and it’s keep on changing! This is kind of frustrating! Can you please check and communicate when the game will be back live again?

developer_response.body:
Hi Vishnu, this was due to a maintenance window for a critical backend update, which was rolled out progressively to ensure stability, it wasn't a 2-day outage. The game has been available for you to enjoy within sometime.

If you’re able to jump back in, we’d really appreciate it if you could revisit your review based on your actual gameplay experience ❤️
Also, feel free to join our Discord for real-time updates: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description:
Amazing. I can play all my shots like in real cricket and the result of each shot feels so real - whether I get out or play a solid cover drive. I gave it 4 stars because there should be tournaments and challenges for bowling also. Also extras aren’t counted in the score in the quick start mode. Extras are counted in the challenges.

Update: I gave 5 stars. Extras are now counted. Everything has improved immensely. I’ve bought 4 new stadiums since my last post. Love the Team chase/challenge they’ve added and play is even more realistic now. Can’t wait to see the new stuff the developers have added for the next release

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your journey with iB Cricket! We’re glad the extras issue is resolved for you and that the improved realism, Team Chase/Challenge, and new stadiums are adding to your experience. Feedback like yours keeps us motivated to keep improving. Do join our Discord for updates and discussions: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_title: Great game, but needs more short-format
reviews.review_description: "I really enjoy the realism of iB Cricket. To make it even better, I suggest adding more short formats in the Quick Play section, specifically 1-over and 2-over matches. A dedicated 'Super Over' challenge mode would also be a fantastic addition for players who want a quick, high-pressure game. Looking forward to seeing these features!"

It very intimate to play and realistic. Gives you the thrill of playing in real cricket stadiums. 

I do love the campaign mode. I have one constructive feedback, I have played other sports games (NFL EA sports), if IB cricket can add features like as we move through the campaign, we are able to select which team we would like to play, for example state level (Gujarat, Rajasthan, Maharashtra), for international level (India, Australia, England and so forth), also can add option to join IPL teams as we progress through the. Campaign mode and creating endless loop for campaign mode. 

Thank you so much

I have just purchased this game and played for 3 days but it is very hard to hit a four let alone a six which is very frustrating ￼.
From reading the discord chat, it seems hitting fours and sixes has been made more difficult with a recent update.
I think this game needs an arcade and realistic mode to satisfy both types of users.
If hitting fours and sixes is made easier with an arcade mode, I would up my rating to 4 stars as the graphics and feel of the game are quite good.

developer_response.body:
In iB Cricket, boundaries are achievable with ease when the ball is timed well with a good bat swing and shot direction. We recommend trying the Coaching module, where the shot analysis can help you understand areas like timing, bat swing and execution, so you can improve and hit fours and sixes more consistently.

You can also join our Discord to get tips, share feedback and stay updated: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description:
Been playing this for a few weeks now and I’m genuinely hooked. The batting feels really satisfying once you get used to the timing, and multiplayer with friends makes it even more fun. I also like that there’s always something to do with tournaments and different game modes.

It’s not perfect and I’d love to see even more tournaments or features added in the future, but overall it’s easily one of the games I keep coming back to on my headset. If you enjoy cricket, this is definitely worth trying!!

reviews.review_title: Good but need Tournaments and things
reviews.review_description:
The game is really good but I’ll highlight what’s it’s lacking badly at this point when it’s most famous cricket VR game, 

It needs cricket tournaments like World Cup, T20 World Cup, or maybe IPL,BBL, PSL or other such leagues or even a WTC test championship. Currently it has tournaments but those aren’t the actual cricket tournaments we see in actual cricket. 

I know I’m saying alot of things but the issue if if the game is widely loved or played then it has to be the best out there and it’s not the BEST, because it’s lacking these major things but yes it’s good if you just wanna enjoy quick matches 

I hope the game makers are working on this real issues that can make the game much much better 
Thanks

developer_response.body: We’re glad you’re enjoying iB Cricket, and we understand your point about wanting more real-world style tournaments and leagues. We already have Custom Tournaments, along with daily 360 and 360 Pro tournaments, and we’ll continue working on deeper tournament experiences based on player feedback. Do join our Discord to share more ideas and stay updated: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description:
unreal game, really fun and enjoyable.
would highly recommend buying if your into cricket. 
i play all the time and it never fails to disappoint. 
love ert

While playing the bat automatically goes 3 feet behind to hit the wicket, even I am playing from outside the crease, still its hit wicket.. what a glitch!! Disappointing.
Dear technical team please look into this..while playing it's really frustrating!

developer_response.body:
This can happen when the controller gets obscured/out of view from the headset or due to poor lighting conditions, affecting tracking.

Please try re-centering by long-pressing the right Meta button and checking your play area/floor height setup. If it still continues, please share a short video of your setup with us on Discord so we can review and assist you: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_title: Steer Clear of this time waste!!
reviews.review_description: Latest update has completely ruined this game. Admin aren’t interested in feedback and make out like they have a “support” team to help you when required. Current state of game is a joke.

developer_response.body:
Players have generally been happy with the latest update and the changes made. The issue you mentioned on Discord was specific to one custom tournament, and it has already been resolved. We hope that was the only issue you encountered.

If you still face any problem, please reach out to us on Discord and we’ll be happy to check it further: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord

reviews.review_description: This is one of most realistic game , mechanics is great , every shot and even edges , one can feel in grip. I like the stadium visuals as well . Crowd gives real feel of playing ground . One thing I do miss is bowling part , the game is basically meant for batsmen. Last point is that internationally the IB bat is not available

developer_response.body:
Hi Anoushka, we’re happy to know that you’re enjoying the realism, shot mechanics, edges, stadium visuals, and crowd feel.

Regarding bowling, have you tried VR Bowling yet? Also, in PvP mode, you can bat for one innings and bowl during the other innings, giving you both sides of the game.

About the iB Cricket bat, availability is currently limited, but we’re working towards making it accessible to more players. Please join our Discord for updates and discussions: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description: Please increase the frequency of short ball and bouncers (atleast on a bouncy pitch). Or according to the field placement and scoring areas.

I’m having an issue on Meta Quest 3 where the game won’t launch and keeps saying “update available,” but there is no option to update in the store.

I’ve already tried restarting my headset and checking the store page, but the problem is still there. It seems like the game thinks there’s an update when there isn’t.

Really enjoy the game when it works, so I hope this can be fixed soon. Please let me know if there’s a solution.

Thanks!

developer_response.body:
Hello Ibrahim, if you’re still facing any issues, please do reach out to us on Discord so we can assist you quickly: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord

If everything is working fine now, we’d truly appreciate it if you could revisit your review based on your gameplay experience❤️🏏

reviews.review_title: I have had this game for long. But...
reviews.review_description: I have had this game for a long time. But suddenly I am facing tracking issues with the game on my quest 3s, sometimes later on in the game or at a few times from the start. I play in a well lit room with no hindering obstacles, at first I thought it was my headset. So, I tried another cricket game named final overs, which ran without a single issue. No other game has tracking issues on my quest 3s except IB cricket. I used to play it daily and it was my favourite game. Please fix the issue. Please don't blame the conditions or headset as I have tested everything thoroughly. Thanks team.

Really fun and impressive! Could some physics details be improved? Sure, and the devs are working on stuff all the time. But even without everything being perfect, how fun is it to "walk" out into a massive oval full of fans with a commentator telling you smashed one for 6? Or got caught on the boundary...or hear the wickets fall behind you...ok that's less fun but you get the idea :)

Also this is just a really good use of VR -- one of those things that doesn't work well in other types of game platforms, but can work well with the headset and controllers.
Crouwd animation looks not good but game is amazing

Excellent detailing and game physics. Similar to quick match - you can introduce quick tournament - target chasing mode with all international teams / ipl teams. The difficulty can be set before the start of the tournament itself so that the required runrate is adjusted for every match in the tournament. Also, career mode i.e. starting from club matches, district level, State level and finally international level would be really exciting.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the wonderful feedback! 🙌🏏
We’re really glad you’re enjoying the detailing and game physics!

Inputs like these help shape what comes next. Appreciate your support, and if you haven’t already, do join our Discord community: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord, we’d love to hear more of your ideas there 😊

I think the game is realistic and it’s good but I think that they need to add lbw and have legs on there and have an lbw mode . Make it so we can run or something and so you can make your own stadiums and create them yourself . Add an test match mod we u can play 2 innings 

Game is really good I love it 
Play add this in tho

reviews.review_description:
Not bad but dont play under anything but 100% conditions.
Things that will affect the tracking of your bat, jewellery, lighting, if your eating, implants in your body. Dog or anyone walking into your play area.
If microphone dont listen to music whilst playing it to will affect your swing..
If they can fix tracking so you swing and your bat doesn't have an epileptic fit sometimes hitting wicket sometimes and I've had a few times, hits the umpire

developer_response.body:
Tracking can sometimes behave inconsistently due to real-world factors like lighting, obstructions, and controller visibility, as it relies on the headset’s tracking system. Game has no control over it.

This Meta troubleshooting guide can help optimize tracking: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J3zTptq59DI

Please join our Discord community at https://bit.ly/ibc-discord and tag @iBCricketSupport for any further assistance.

reviews.review_title: Great potential, but needs better player
reviews.review_description: The game is fun, but it lacks 'player presence.' We really need to see our hands on the bat and a full body model to judge our stance and movements accurately. Also, the bat-ball connection needs work; I often play a perfect real-life shot only for it to hit the 'sticker' or produce a weird inside edge that defies physics. If the devs fix the collision logic and add player models, this would be a 5-star game!

developer_response.body:
Hi Deepak, with current hardware (headset + two controllers), accurately tracking full body movement and both hands on the bat is still a challenge. Since hand and foot alignment is critical, any mismatch can break immersion or even cause discomfort.

You can also use the “Replay” feature to better understand shot timing and connection.

Thanks again for your valuable input! If you haven’t already, do join our Discord for updates and discussions: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description: Adding stumping is a bad idea ... And after match winning , it should announce man of the match and after 50 or 100 it should be celebrated. A 6 hit in a crowd should be catch by crowd .  Swing notification from hands of bowler should not be apply from 6-10 batsmen if he is already playing at 0 bat shield or at least give 10% bat shield if no show of swing signs, for batters after 5 wickets , bowlers should have less  or 1 option of swings  / power bowling .

All I have to say is, it is a really great game that I've been playing for the last 3 years almost every day. Sometimes just 30 minutes after work for some exercise. Love playing it and I hope to keep seeing improvements which the devs have been constantly doing.

reviews.review_description:
Since yesterday the game
 was running good . But since yesterday evening the game started behaving poorly . We need to see down to start the game and the controlls and the options are showing near to my leg which is abnormal this needs to be fixed

developer_response.body:
Based on what you’ve described, this usually happens when the headset’s play area (boundary) gets updated or misaligned, which can shift the UI and controls closer to the ground. We recommend clearing your boundary/guardian history and setting up your room-scale play area again, making sure the floor height is configured correctly. This should resolve the issue.

If you need any help with the steps or if the issue still persists, please feel free to reach out to us on our Discord community: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord, we’ll be happy to assist you further there.

First thing first the commentary is god awful, its the same 4 lines and even you win the commentators will still be insulting you, genuinely better in mute. Next is the mechanics, block shots aren’t possible in this game and most shots in general aren’t possible as they just phase through the bat. The last ball of the game is always not possible to even hit and even if u do hit it it eill magically find a way to a fielder. Also the bowling is so fake you can only bowl to the nets and there is only one net you can even bowl to plus the bowling just generally sucks its so bad non of it makes any sense and if you think I’m just bad i can win a game on the highest difficulties the game just sucks I’m sorry to break it

DO NOT BUY IM WARNING YOU

If you guys can make the fielding more realistic than things can get much better. I find commentary in the game as another issue. But overall apart from these issues i find this game very much entertaining.

reviews.review_title: The best cricket game in meta
reviews.review_description: I tried other cricket games too but this is the best byfar

developer_response.body: Ravi, we’re glad to hear iB Cricket stands out as the best cricket game on Meta for you. Your support means a lot to us. Do join our Discord for updates and discussions: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord 🏏

reviews.review_title: Perfect game, i have one request.
reviews.review_description: Love this game, the only thing that would make it better for me is the option to see replays in real speed instead of the shots being slowed down. It would be nice to see how I play shots against 85+ mph without it being slowed down. Thanks

developer_response.body: We’re really glad you’re enjoying the game! Noted down your suggestion. If you haven’t already, we’d love to have you in our Discord community as well, join us here: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description:
Update: Thank you for your response, but it does not address the core concerns being raised about iB Cricket.

The primary issue is not minor bugs or isolated glitches — it is the fundamental inconsistency in how the game interprets cricket itself. The AI behavior often comes across as poorly calibrated, lacking a basic understanding of real cricketing principles such as timing, shot selection, and field placement. Outcomes frequently feel arbitrary rather than skill-driven, which significantly undermines the credibility of the experience.

Several patterns make this especially concerning:

The system appears to override realistic physics and rules in an attempt to artificially increase difficulty. Balls behaving inconsistently, improbable fielding reactions, and non-intuitive shot outcomes suggest that challenge is being introduced at the expense of authenticity.
The AI decision-making often feels illogical and disconnected from actual cricketing scenarios, which breaks immersion for anyone with even a moderate understanding of the sport.
Rather than scaling difficulty through smarter gameplay mechanics, it seems to rely on non-transparent adjustments that disadvantage the player, creating a perception of bias rather than fairness.

Cricket is a sport deeply rooted in nuance, timing, and physics. When those fundamentals are compromised, the entire experience starts to feel less like a simulation and more like a scripted system working against the player.

If the goal is to build a credible cricketing platform, the focus should be on:

Consistent and explainable physics
AI that reflects real cricket strategies and constraints
Transparent difficulty scaling that rewards skill rather than penalizing it

Until those core issues are addressed, the experience will continue to feel inconsistent and, at times, fundamentally disconnected from the sport it aims to represent.


------------
I don’t understand how iB Cricket has so many positive ratings — the experience feels completely inconsistent and borderline misleading.

First, the AI is not as “intelligent” as advertised. It behaves unpredictably and often feels biased. Certain outcomes feel pre-determined rather than based on your actual shot timing or positioning. Even experienced players have complained that shots that should connect cleanly just don’t register correctly, which makes the whole system feel unreliable rather than skill-based.

Then there’s the biggest issue: the gameplay and detection actually get worse as the match progresses. Early on, things feel somewhat responsive, but as you continue, tracking and shot detection start breaking down. There are multiple reports of the bat tracking going haywire, balls passing through the bat, or fielders behaving unrealistically — like already being in position before the shot is even completed. 

What’s more frustrating is that this isn’t a one-off issue. A lot of users mention tracking glitches, inconsistent physics, and erratic behavior mid-game, making it feel like the system can’t handle sustained gameplay properly.

There’s also a strange pattern where the game feels artificially tuned — almost like difficulty and outcomes are being manipulated instead of fairly simulated. It creates a strong impression that certain users (or possibly paying users / specific setups) might be getting a smoother or more favorable experience, while others deal with degraded performance and inconsistent AI.

Even outside gameplay, there are reliability issues — people reporting downtime, maintenance messages, and access problems when trying to play. 

What’s shocking is that despite all this, the game still shows “very positive” ratings overall 
 — which honestly makes those ratings feel questionable given how many fundamental issues are being discussed in communities.

Overall, this doesn’t feel like a polished AI-driven cricket experience. It feels like a system that looks good initially, but falls apart the longer you play — with inconsistent detection, questionable AI behavior, and a lack of transparency that makes it hard to trust.

Definitely not worth the hype.

developer_response.body:
We’d like to clarify that your batting is driven by timing, bat angle, and tracking data. Tracking itself is handled by the headset system, and its performance can vary based on lighting conditions, play area setup, and controller visibility.

We recommend going through Meta’s tracking best practices and troubleshooting guide here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J3zTptq59DI

Many players are actively enjoying stable gameplay across modes. If you’ve personally experienced any of the issues you have mentioned, we’d really like to look into them. Please reach out to us on Discord with screenshots or video recordings so we can assist you better: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description:
I think this game is very good. With lots of potential. LBW is definitely needed. Sometimes the ball pitches outside leg stump goes through the legs and hit the stumps, which obviously is just not out if it was to hit your pads. 

Test match mode is also needed where there is two innings with a target 

But on the whole it’s very very good  ￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words and for taking the time to share your feedback! We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the game and see the potential in it.

Your suggestions like LBW and a Test match mode with two innings are great. In fact, these are already in our pipeline. Feedback like yours helps us prioritize and refine upcoming features.

If you haven’t already, we’d love for you to join our Discord community and share more of your ideas with other players: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

One of the best cricket game for vr.

reviews.review_title: System under maintenance since 2 days US
reviews.review_description:
Thanks for the update. It’s now fixed.
I’ve been seeing a “system under maintenance” message for the past 2 days, which is really frustrating. Initially, it said the system would be back in 2 hours, but after waiting, it kept extending — now showing 6 hours for the US region.

There’s been no clear communication or update on what’s actually going on. This doesn’t feel like normal maintenance anymore — it seems like a major outage or server issue.

I really enjoy the game, but this kind of downtime without proper updates is disappointing. Hoping the developers fix this soon and improve communication with users.

Hi, when I am trying to open my game. There is update required. But when I am going to meta store . There is no update written in Ib cricket. There is only shown open. When I am opening it. Same issue coming.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for reporting this issue, we really appreciate it🙌

This usually happens due to a headset software sync issue. Could you try restarting your headset once and checking again? Also ensure your headset software is up to date.

If the issue still persists, please join our Discord and share a quick screenshot or video: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord, we’ll help you resolve it quickly.

reviews.review_description:
Overall game is super fun! Really like the physics and the campaign mode. Much more realistic than all the other cricket games currently. Lot of room for improvement. Esp on multiplayer mode. Highly recommended to but a 3D printed bat for this! 
VR cricket guy got me hooked.

developer_response.body:
Hello Sharmaji, the game was down due to a temporary maintenance update, and the game is now available again for you to enjoy.

Really glad to hear you enjoy the physics and campaign mode, that means a lot! 😊 
If you get a chance to jump back in, we’d truly appreciate it if you could revisit your review based on your actual gameplay experience❤️

Also, feel free to join our Discord community for updates and discussions: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description:
This game could be so good. Alas, it is not.
On the rare occasions I’m not having tracking issues (the bat moving and glitching as I play a shot) it feels very realistic, however this is always very short lived and the afore mentioned issues soon arise.

UPDATE!

It’s getting even worse.
I’ve been polite but it’s time to get your act together now

developer_response.body:
Hi Darlo, tracking is primarily handled by the headset system, and its performance can vary based on factors like lighting conditions, play area setup, and controller visibility.

To help resolve this, we recommend going through Meta’s official tracking troubleshooting guide here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J3zTptq59DI

If the issue still persists after trying those steps, please do reach out to us on Discord, we’ll be happy to work with you closely and get this sorted: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_title: Good physics, fun to play, bit erratic
reviews.review_description:
The game is fun and captures the feel of batting pretty well. But has a few flaws:
- Often need multiple tries to get the spatial positioning right, seems to set the wickets in a corner always
- Ball tracking definitely seems off at times, often the replay shows the ball and bat in a different place than it was while playing. Could be a device thing but then needs to be caught somehow.
- Not sure if this is true, but often the game feels rigged. Some overs the best timed shot rolls over to the fielder and then in some overs just hanging the bat gives a boundary. Have observed this many times!
- Also needs a timing indicator/power meter to show why the shots are not going far, it is almost impossible to hit sixes and you have not idea why

developer_response.body:
Hello Shashank, your playing position and orientation are defined by your boundary setup and the place where you are using the headset. If the alignment feels off, you can re-center the game by long-pressing the Meta button on the right controller.

From what you’ve described, it appears you may be experiencing tracking issues. Tracking can be affected by lighting conditions, play area setup, or bat attachments. We recommend going through this video for best practices and troubleshooting tips: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J3zTptq59DI

If you haven’t already, feel free to join our Discord community for assistance and to share ideas with other players: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description:
There is a issue that when I open ib cricket in my vr headset it shows me a message that meta store may take some time to reflect the update for my device    if I am not able to get the option to update in next 1 hour please contact meta
 support

Hello Arham, the game is available for you to enjoy. If you’re still not seeing the update, please reach out to us on Discord and we’ll assist you right away: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord

reviews.review_description: The commentary should be updated. It would make the game very good if the voice of a famous commentation is added to the game
Is there any upcoming update will be came or not like 10/20 over game easy,meduim,Hard mode. If there is no update then  i will delete this apps.

Hi, the game already includes 10 and 20 over formats, along with Easy, Medium, and Hard difficulty levels. It’s possible you might have missed these options, we’d be happy to guide you through them.

If you’re looking for something different or facing any issues accessing these modes, do let us know. You can also join our Discord community here: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord, we’ll help you out right away🏏

reviews.review_description:

Secondly there should be a mode of playing against previous worldcup squads with their jerseys of that time to enjoy nostalgia cricket

developer_response.body: Custom bowler actions, skins, and selecting opponent attacks are good ideas, and the classic World Cup mode with retro jerseys sounds exciting! Do join our Discord to share more ideas and stay updated: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description: This game is good, been playing it for 2 years now. But now, it has started to feel boring. Need: Graphic improvements like PS 5, more realistic commentators ( REFER Ea cricket)

reviews.review_title: Its Alright! Not that good though
reviews.review_description: So I was expecting some tournaments (50, 20) overs at the least, may be some local leagues! I sure was highly disappointed with that aspect! I do play here and there when am bored, you can never experience a complete tournament with this game!! I hope the developers introduce something like that soon!

developer_response.body:
Hi gokugojo, the game already includes tournament modes. In the Season Tournaments, you can play 360 and 360 Pro, which include 20-over and 50-over tournaments. Additionally, in Custom Tournaments, you can create your own tournament and invite friends, with formats like round robin followed by knockouts or pool stages followed by knockouts.

We truly appreciate your feedback, and if you haven’t explored these modes yet, we encourage you to try them out.

If you haven’t already, feel free to join our Discord community to share ideas and connect with other players: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description: It doesn't track where I hit it,it also doesn't track my movements.Glitches frequently, and the ball "physics" isn't good as well.Furthermore, the positioning when I hit the ball does not allow it to go where I hit it, rather than that it would either edge it somewhere which can't be hit down there or it would hit the toe end of the bat and skies it

developer_response.body:
This typically indicates a tracking or setup issue rather than a problem with game physics. Even slight tracking instability (lighting, reflections, low controller battery, or attachment obstruction) can cause this behavior.

We recommend reviewing Meta’s official tracking troubleshooting video:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J3zTptq59DI

Please ensure:
* The room is well lit (not dim or overly bright)
* No mirrors/reflective surfaces nearby
* Controller batteries are charged
* If using a bat attachment, the controller isn’t obstructed

If it still persists, please join our Discord and share a short clip of your setup so we can assist further:
https://bit.ly/ibc-discord

We’d love to help you get the experience running smoothly.🏏

reviews.review_description: Today the app is in maintenance, which is Okie . But you kept on changing the time , first you have shown 4 hours after 4 hours you have shown 1:30 hours and keep on changing it .

reviews.review_description:
Easily the best VR cricket game. Good realism and can support all abilities. Super fun and good graphics and stadiums. Could play all day

Love the feature of being able to chase down a score but should be added to unlimited over.

I think they should add team lists to games so you can choose what 5 bowlers bowl instead of it being random.

developer_response.body:
We’re really glad you’re enjoying the realism, graphics, stadiums, and the target-chasing mode. Your suggestions are noted. If you haven’t already, we’d love for you to join our Discord community at https://bit.ly/ibc-discord to stay updated and continue these discussions with fellow players.

Thanks again for your support🏏

reviews.review_description: Nice

developer_response.body:
Really glad you’re enjoying the game🏏

We appreciate your support, do join our Discord community as well: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord

reviews.review_description:
I am a regular user of IB cricket, and my recommendation is why not bring a tournament in the game. Such as world cups, test championships and ipl kinda stuff!! 

Where users can select their own team and play a tournament with other opposite teams!!! Like other teams represented by computer player. 
I have seen many players are wanting something like this in discord channels. 

That would be much fun!!! Please if you could add something like that!!!! 
Anyways good work with the game. 🤙🏻🤙🏻

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for your suggestions and for taking the time to share your feedback, we really appreciate it. We’ll certainly consider these ideas for future updates..

Thanks again for your support! 🏏

reviews.review_description: Game sight goes black after 10 minutes as well as while trying to cast meta horizon failing and ask for zap update while it’s already updated 🙁

developer_response.body:
The black screen and casting issues are a device/software sync issue. A quick restart of the headset and ensuring your Meta system software is fully up to date usually helps in such cases.

If the issue persists, please reach out to us on Discord so we can assist you directly and troubleshoot this with you: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_description: The game itself is 5-star quality—excellent graphics and very realistic gameplay. It’s a must-have for any cricket fan.

developer_response.body:
Hi Mohith, due to the festive/public holiday, our response time was slightly impacted. Your issue has now been resolved, and we’re working to improve our responsiveness going forward.

For quicker support, feel free to join our Discord: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord

Appreciate your patience.

reviews.review_title: Lbw and DRS Should also be involved into
reviews.review_description: Full body should appear for the batsman. That will be easy to make good instance. Also LBW should be there as well DRS should be there

developer_response.body:
Hi Abhay, LBW and DRS are great additions and definitely on our radar as we continue to bring more real-world cricket elements into the game.

Regarding full body presence, with current hardware (headset + controllers), accurately tracking full body can be tricky and may impact realism or comfort.

Thanks again for your input! Do join our Discord to stay updated and share more ideas: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord🏏

reviews.review_title: Unable to play after recent update
reviews.review_description: Since 2 days app is not opening, some small dots/stars are moving towards me thatsall, game is not starting. Please rectify

developer_response.body:
Hi Arun, This issue is usually related to a device/OS cache rather than the game itself. Kindly ensure your headset software is up to date, try restarting your device, and then launch the game again. This should resolve the issue in most cases.

If it still persists, please reach out to us on Discord: https://bit.ly/ibc-discord, we’ll help you right away.

reviews.review_description:
Great game highly recommend! 

Hey devs couple of things,

why does the keeper stand so close to pace? I feel like they miss the more simple edges cause they dont have time to move to the ball making edge angle very sharp for every fielder behind stumps, can this be fixed?

Fielders could be more responsive in general too to add realism 

Also having no legs mixed with bowlers pitching legside is an unrealistic wicked but i digress as i dont mind too much forces you to play legside tho, having legs or a sort of  'ball blocker' under batters movements to act as legs would be cool

Also adding a realistic mechanic of batting with ai partner at other end would be cool for long test match forms, but only worth doing if in depth and realistic which i understand might not be possible.

Over all its a great game and i cant believe i can just face 1000 balls in the nets in vr these days so good for prospective players, im being really picky on realism in game play with my review but game is so fun and challenging 💯

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the detailed and thoughtful review. It truly means a lot to us, and we really appreciate you taking the time to share the insights.
We’re really glad you’re enjoying the core gameplay and finding value in the realism and challenge. If you haven’t already, we’d love to have you in our Discord community at https://bit.ly/ibc-discord. It’s the best place to share ideas, join discussions, and be part of the ongoing development journey.

reviews.review_description:
I have been waiting for a game like this for years.

At last I can actually play cricket without having to find friends, space and equipment. I can pick up the headset and be playing in a few minutes.

I purchased one of the 3d printed bats and this makes it even more enjoyable.

I would like to see licensed teams in there and a proper career mode but that's probably asking too much.

I haven't explored bowling yet and when I clock on it in the headset I'm not convinced I know how to do anything. Still as a game I love the batting.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your experience! 🙏
We’re really happy to hear how easy it is for you to jump in and play, and that the 3D-printed bat has made batting even more enjoyable. 

If you’d like tips on bowling or want to stay updated on future additions, feel free to join our Discord at https://bit.ly/ibc-discord, we’d love to have you there. 🏏
